DOWNSTAIRS

Three rooms beneath the bistro.
The Lounge·The Private Room·The Whole Floor

Below Pompette, the whole basement of 101 Leroux runs nearly a full block. Take a velvet corner, the private dining room, or the entire space — copper bar, leopard, and all. Every gathering is built around the same idea: timeless classicism, innovative mixology.

L’Alcôve
LRG · The Lounge

L’Alcôve

A moody, velvet-draped semi-private lounge tucked into the room — the quiet corner for an intimate gathering, just steps from the copper bar.

Souterrain

The large private dining room within Little Rich Girl — walnut shelving, banquettes, and a door that opens to the bar or closes for a room of your own.

The Whole Floor
